prompt: Recover from an agent crashing mid-execution while holding the state lock.
agent_thoughts: Converting Mutex locks to TTL leases. If an agent dies, the lease simply expires and the next agent takes over.
plan: Agent 1 crashes. Agent 2 waits until TTL expires and reclaims the lock.
patch: System patched Node 1 independently after Agent 1 died.
reason: TTL Lease successfully expired the dead agent's holding lock, allowing the system to naturally recover from a deadlock state.
